infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Yaanam needs your location to track the bus route for parents and school.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Yaanam needs background location to track the bus even when the app is not in focus.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Yaanam needs background location to track your bus route.

plugins.cameraPermission: Yaanam uses the camera to take a boarding photo when you mark a student present.
